name: Oatmeal Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream margarine and shortening with sugars, eggs, corn syrup, water, and vanilla until well combined.
2. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
3. Mix dry ingredients into the creamed mixture until fully incorporated.
4. Stir in oats and raisins.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
7. Allow cookies to cool slightly on the sheet before transferring them to cooling racks.
